# dimension

**Instance Property**

The dimension or axis along which to split the tensor.

## Declaration

```swift
var dimension: Int { get }
```

## Inspecting Split Layers

- **splitCount**: The number of splits.
- **splitSectionLengths**: An array that contains the lengths of each split section.

items.description: An array that contains the lengths of each split section.
